2606.09195.title: Symbolic and Abstractive Reasoning with Complex Visual Queries
2606.09195.paper_summary: Understanding and reasoning over abstract visual content remains a challenge for current multi-modal large language models (MLLMs). In this paper, we explore a novel abstract data type termed complex visual query (CVQ), designed to probe symbolic and abstractive reasoning, which is a critical yet underexplored dimension of human-like neuro-symbolic reasoning for MLLMs. We present a comprehensive investigation from three perspectives: \textbf{Data $\times$ Paradigm $\times$ Exploration}. Specifically, we propose a scalable pipeline for synthesizing CVQs grounded in large-scale multi-modal knowledge graphs, generating a diverse dataset encompassing 14 distinct query types via systematic combinations of first-order logic operators. We further introduce a two-stage training framework that progressively equips MLLMs with robust visual reasoning capabilities. We conduct extensive experiments to rigorously evaluate MLLMs across multiple dimensions, including reasoning performance on CVQs, as well as cross-task and cross-scenario generalization. We believe our work opens new perspectives and avenues for advancing the reasoning frontiers of MLLMs.
2606.09195.paper_summary_zh: 理解和推理抽象視覺內容對於當前的多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 仍然是一個挑戰。在本文中，我們探討了一種新穎的抽象數據類型，稱為複雜視覺查詢 (CVQ)，旨在探測符號和抽象推理，這是 MLLMs 人類般神經符號推理的一個關鍵但尚未充分探索的維度。我們從三個角度進行全面調查：\textbf{數據 $\times$ 範式 $\times$ 探索}。具體而言，我們提出了一個可擴展的管道，用於合成基於大規模多模態知識圖的 CVQ，通過一階邏輯運算符的系統組合生成一個包含 14 種不同查詢類型的多樣數據集。我們進一步介紹了一個兩階段的訓練框架，逐步為 MLLMs 裝備強大的視覺推理能力。我們進行了廣泛的實驗，以嚴謹評估 MLLMs 在多個維度上的表現，包括對 CVQ 的推理性能，以及跨任務和跨場景的泛化。我們相信，我們的工作為推進 MLLMs 的推理邊界開辟了新的視角和途徑。
2606.09195.author: Yichi Zhang et.al.
2606.09195.authors: Yichi Zhang, Jingdian Lu, Zhuo Chen, Lingbing Guo, Jun Xu, Wen Zhang, Huajun Chen
